summary: Built strategic positioning for Careerspan as a talent sourcing engine. Core argument enhanced with 46% hiring failure stat (90% soft-skill mismatches), internal talent angle, Marvin Ventures partnership, and zero marketing spend PMF signal. Emphasized human-first UX producing HR-grade data, and coaching capturing what reviews miss.
key_insight: The 46% hiring failure rate (90% soft-skill mismatch) proves the resume-based sourcing paradigm is fundamentally broken. Careerspan's coaching approach captures exactly what resumes miss—values, mindset, and soft skills—while the community embedding model provides access competitors cannot buy.
changes_v1.1: Added 46% hiring failure stat and 90% soft-skill mismatch framing to Section 2
Added 'untapped internal talent' angle with manager-as-talent-spotter problem
Enhanced Section 3.2 with 'human-first yet detailed' differentiator
Added 'coaching captures what reviews miss' (response to challenge, self-awareness trajectory, ambition-action gap)
Added Marvin Ventures partnership to proof points
Added zero marketing spend as PMF signal
Removed GPT-4 reference, updated to 'production multi-agent AI architecture'
